phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si prende il vaporetto linea dodici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see PREN-deh eel vah-po-RET-toh LEE-neh-ah DOH-dee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Fondamente Nove, isola quattro, direzione Murano.
likely_response.pronunciation: fohn-dah-MEHN-teh NOH-veh ee-SOH-lah kw-AHTT-roh dee-reh-tsee-OH-neh moo-RAH-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Fondamente Nove, pier four, direction Murano.

responses.english: Fondamente Nove, pier four, direction Murano.
responses.phonetic: fohn-dah-MEHN-teh NOH-veh ee-SOH-lah kw-AHTT-roh dee-reh-tsee-OH-neh moo-RAH-noh
responses.local: Fondamente Nove, isola quattro, direzione Murano.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si vedono le dimostrazioni di vetro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see VEH-doh-noh leh dee-moh-strah-TSYOH-nee dee VEH-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Nelle fabbriche lungo il canale principale.
likely_response.pronunciation: NEHL-leh fahbb-REECH-eh LOON-goh EEL kah-NAH-leh preen-chee-PAH-leh
likely_response.translation_en: In factories along the main canal.

responses.english: In factories along the main canal.
responses.phonetic: NEHL-leh fahbb-REECH-eh LOON-goh EEL kah-NAH-leh preen-chee-PAH-leh
responses.local: Nelle fabbriche lungo il canale principale.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il Museo del Vetro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel moo-ZEH-oh del VEH-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Come riconosco il vetro di Murano autentico?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-may ree-koh-NOH-skoh eel VEH-troh dee moo-RAH-noh ow-TEN-tee-koh

likely_response.local: Cerchi il marchio inciso sulla base.
likely_response.pronunciation: CHEHRCH-ee EEL mahrch-EE-oh een-CHEE-soh SOOL-lah BAH-seh
likely_response.translation_en: Look for the etched mark on the base.

responses.english: Look for the etched mark on the base.
responses.phonetic: CHEHRCH-ee EEL mahrch-EE-oh een-CHEE-soh SOOL-lah BAH-seh
responses.local: Cerchi il marchio inciso sulla base.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando parte il prossimo vaporetto per Venezia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-doh PAR-teh eel PROS-see-moh vah-po-RET-toh per veh-NEET-syah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Ogni dieci minuti, controlli il tabellone.
likely_response.pronunciation: OHJ-nee dee-EH-chee mee-NOO-tee kohnt-ROHL-lee EEL tah-behl-LOH-neh
likely_response.translation_en: Every ten minutes, check the board.

responses.english: Every ten minutes, check the board.
responses.phonetic: OHJ-nee dee-EH-chee mee-NOO-tee kohnt-ROHL-lee EEL tah-behl-LOH-neh
responses.local: Ogni dieci minuti, controlli il tabellone.
